summary: Tests will not run as-is due to missing fixture files (fixtures/patch/VERSION, fixtures/minor/VERSION, etc.) that Workflow.Tests.ps1 references. Unit tests for Get-NextVersion and file I/O have decent coverage, but New-ChangelogEntry testing is shallow, error scenarios are sparse (only 1 error test), and edge cases like whitespace handling, malformed commits, and missing files aren't covered. Workflow.Tests.ps1 references undefined output markers (NEW_VERSION_MARKER) without showing what the actual workflow produces. Complex Python YAML parsing adds fragility. Critical gap: the task requires 'Create mock commit logs as test fixtures' but fixture files are never shown being created—they're only referenced. The integration tests cannot pass without these fixtures.
